description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting a bearded male figure with curly hair, draped in a toga-like garment. The bust is mounted on a rounded pedestal base, and the figure's expression is solemn and contemplative. The sculpted details include intricate curls in the hair and beard, as well as realistic folds in the drapery across the chest and shoulders. The back of the bust is less detailed, with a smooth surface and minimal garment folds. The material appears to be a light brown or tan stone, possibly marble or a similar stone, with a matte finish. The sculpture is slightly weathered, giving it an antique appearance.
description: A classical bust of a bearded man in a toga, finely detailed in stone with a rounded pedestal base and a matte, antique finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed facial features, curly hair, and draped garment across the chest.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the facial expression, beard, and the folds of the toga on the right shoulder.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back of the head with curly hair and the smooth, less detailed back of the bust.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the back of the bust and pedestal, with minimal garment detail visible.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the background is isolated and neutral.
